description.tr: UK-wide collections across London, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Glasgow and all postal areas. Secure movement of household goods, parcels and commercial freight from the UK to your address in Turkey.
description.en: UK-wide collections across London, Manchester, Birmingham, Leeds, Glasgow and all postal areas. Secure movement of household goods, parcels and commercial freight from the UK to your address in Turkey.

description.tr: Delivery points across Turkey with door-to-door distribution. Customs inspection and address confirmation handled with local teams.
description.en: Delivery points across Turkey with door-to-door distribution. Customs inspection and address confirmation handled with local teams.

description.tr: For Germany-origin loads, primary planning is consolidation via the UK hub or combined road/ro-ro links into Turkey. UK→TR contracting is in scope for this site.
description.en: For Germany-origin loads, primary planning is consolidation via the UK hub or combined road/ro-ro links into Turkey. UK→TR contracting is in scope for this site.

description.tr: Parcel and LTL options from Rotterdam/Amsterdam with sea plus UK transfer or direct strings. Customs and insurance scenarios are clarified per project.
description.en: Parcel and LTL options from Rotterdam/Amsterdam with sea plus UK transfer or direct strings. Customs and insurance scenarios are clarified per project.

description.tr: From France, Channel routing or direct Ro-Ro plans into Turkey, aligned with the UK→TR brand positioning of this property.
description.en: From France, Channel routing or direct Ro-Ro plans into Turkey, aligned with the UK→TR brand positioning of this property.
